response: In 2023, director Christopher Nolan released the drama/history film *Oppenheimer*, which runs 180 minutes and had a production budget of $100 million. The film was a massive commercial and critical success, grossing $952 million worldwide at the box office, earning an 8.3 rating on IMDB and a 93% critics score on Rotten Tomatoes, and taking home the Oscar for Best Picture.
